_comment: Dismissal scenarios for appointment prep Step 4. Each entry has a title (the dismissal phrase) and category (for frontend grouping). Keywords are matched against urgent_symptom text (case-insensitive substring). Modify only this file to add/change scenarios — no code changes required.
_dismissed_before_removed: The 'dismissed_before' branch previously added 'What are the triggers?' to scenarios when the user had been dismissed before. This was not a dismissal scenario but an open question, so it was removed in the JSON refactor.
